title: Fresh fixed-schema IDMAC stall capture on clean diagnostic branch
reason: The queue had no open technical runtime item after the b4 handoff work. Prior source audits closed speculative register writes; the next responsible step is a clean measurement artifact before another behavior patch.
next_action: Create a fresh Strix diagnostic worktree, add only instrumentation needed for fixed-schema SDMMC0/fabric capture, boot Cubie3 once over UART, extract rows into a733-sdmmc-register-dump-template.json format, then restore Cubie3 to vendor kernel.
do_not_do: Do not stack on stale H113 without resetting to a clean diagnostic base.
Do not add another fabric/security write without a named delta from the capture.
Do not send or rewrite upstream patches.
